description_long: This is a rectangular bar of artisanal soap wrapped in a combination of brown kraft paper and a striped yellow-and-white paper. The front features a prominent lavender label with the brand name 'Abeja Reyna' and the product name 'jabón artesanal BABA DE CARACOL' in white text. The back side displays a detailed product description, ingredients list, and barcode, all printed on a white label. The sides of the soap are covered in the striped paper, with the initials 'AR' and a small crown motif embossed on the ends. The packaging appears tightly wrapped, with some minor creasing and wear visible at the edges. The overall appearance is rustic yet carefully branded, suggesting a handmade, premium product.
description: A rectangular artisanal soap bar wrapped in brown kraft and yellow-striped paper, featuring a lavender label and detailed product information on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the lavender product label with the brand and soap name clearly visible on the brown kraft paper wrap.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the yellow-and-white striped paper wrapping and the embossed 'AR' with a crown motif on the end.
description_view_2: The back view displays the white label with product description, ingredients, barcode, and manufacturer details.
description_view_3: The right side view again shows the striped wrapping and the 'AR' motif, with visible creasing at the paper edges.
attribute_packaging_design: Rectangular bar wrapped in brown kraft paper with yellow-and-white stripes on the sides, featuring a lavender label on the front and a white information label on the back. Embossed 'AR' and crown motif on the ends add a distinctive touch.
attribute_label_text: REGENERADOR CELULAR, ELIMINA ACNÉ Y MARCAS EN LA PIEL. EFECTO EXFOLIANTE.
Ingredientes: baba de caracol, miel de abeja, aceite de almendra, uva, aguacate, papaya y avena.
